description: Etherpad is a real-time collaborative editor.

tools.name: create-group
tools.description: creates a new group

tools.name: create-group-if-not-exists-for
tools.description: this functions helps you to map your application group ids to Etherpad group ids

tools.name: delete-group
tools.description: deletes a group

tools.name: list-pads
tools.description: returns all pads of this group

tools.name: create-pad
tools.description: creates a new (non-group) pad

tools.name: create-group-pad
tools.description: creates a new pad in this group

tools.name: create-author
tools.description: creates a new author

tools.name: create-author-if-not-exists-for
tools.description: this functions helps you to map your application author ids to Etherpad author ids

tools.name: list-pads-of-author
tools.description: returns an array of all pads this author contributed to

tools.name: create-session
tools.description: creates a new session. validUntil is an unix timestamp in seconds

tools.name: delete-session
tools.description: deletes a session

tools.name: get-session-info
tools.description: returns information about a session

tools.name: list-sessions-of-group
tools.description: returns all sessions of a group

tools.name: list-sessions-of-author
tools.description: returns all sessions of an author

tools.name: get-text
tools.description: returns the text of a pad

tools.name: set-text
tools.description: sets the text of a pad

tools.name: get-html
tools.description: returns the text of a pad formatted as HTML

tools.name: set-html
tools.description: sets the text of a pad with HTML

tools.name: get-revisions-count
tools.description: returns the number of revisions of this pad

tools.name: get-last-edited
tools.description: returns the timestamp of the last revision of the pad

tools.name: delete-pad
tools.description: deletes a pad

tools.name: get-read-only-id
tools.description: returns the read only link of a pad

tools.name: set-public-status
tools.description: sets a boolean for the public status of a pad

tools.name: get-public-status
tools.description: return true of false

tools.name: list-authors-of-pad
tools.description: returns an array of authors who contributed to this pad

tools.name: pad-users-count
tools.description: returns the number of user that are currently editing this pad

tools.name: get-author-name
tools.description: Returns the Author Name of the author

tools.name: pad-users
tools.description: returns the list of users that are currently editing this pad

tools.name: send-clients-message
tools.description: sends a custom message of type msg to the pad

tools.name: list-all-groups
tools.description: returns the IDs of all groups on this server

tools.name: check-token
tools.description: returns ok when the current API token is valid

tools.name: list-all-pads
tools.description: list all the pads

tools.name: create-diff-html
tools.description: returns an HTML diff between two revisions of a pad

tools.name: get-chat-history
tools.description: returns the chat history

tools.name: get-chat-head
tools.description: returns the chatHead (chat-message) of the pad

tools.name: get-attribute-pool
tools.description: returns the attribute pool of a pad

tools.name: get-revision-changeset
tools.description: returns the changeset at a given revision of a pad

tools.name: copy-pad
tools.description: copies a pad with full history and chat

tools.name: move-pad
tools.description: moves a pad — copy then delete the original

tools.name: get-pad-id
tools.description: returns the read-write pad ID for a given read-only pad ID

tools.name: get-saved-revisions-count
tools.description: returns the number of saved revisions of a pad

tools.name: list-saved-revisions
tools.description: returns the list of saved revisions of a pad

tools.name: save-revision
tools.description: saves a revision of a pad

tools.name: restore-revision
tools.description: restores a pad to a specific revision

tools.name: append-chat-message
tools.description: appends a chat message

tools.name: append-text
tools.description: appends text to a pad

tools.name: get-stats
tools.description: returns server-wide statistics

tools.name: copy-pad-without-history
tools.description: copies a pad without history or chat

tools.name: compact-pad
tools.description: compacts a pad's revision history, keeping recent revisions only

tools.name: anonymize-author
tools.description: anonymizes an author across all their edits
